name: Successful Login from Specific City
notes: This rule returns location data, provided by MaxMind, for a selected IP address and populates the reference table "Impossible Travel".
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success
when the event matches Username is not N/A
when the event context is Remote to Local
when the event matches GEO::LOOKUP(sourceip, 'city_name') != '{"city":{"name":null}}' AND GEO::LOOKUP(sourceip, 'city_name') != '{}' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Successful Login from Specific City on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success
AND when the event matches Username is not N/A
AND when the event context is Remote to Local
AND when the event matches GEO::LOOKUP(sourceip, 'city_name') != '{"city":{"name":null}}' AND GEO::LOOKUP(sourceip, 'city_name') != '{}' AQL filter query
RED_list: Add to the Reference Table: "Impossible Travel"
The outer key is value of this event/flow property: "userName"
